cases.prompt: 앱 설치 어트리뷰션 연동해줘. SKAdNetwork랑 ATT 프롬프트도.

assertions.text: Picks an MMP SDK (Branch/AppsFlyer free tier).
Maps SKAdNetwork conversion values and an iOS ATT pre-prompt.
Wires Install Referrer / AdServices and deferred deep-link install→first-open join.

cases.prompt: Set up mobile install attribution with deferred deep links and an attributable first_open event.

assertions.text: Recognizes this is mobile install attribution, NOT web/page tracking (tag-manager-integrator).
